children.heading: .—Assessment Required
children.label: a .—Assessment Required
children.text: The Comptroller General of the United States shall submit to the congressional defense committees an annual assessment of selected acquisition programs and initiatives of the Department of Defense by March 30th of each year from 2020 through 2029.
a macro analysis of how well acquisition programs and initiatives are performing and reasons for that performance;
specific analyses of individual acquisition programs and initiatives; and
other issues as determined appropriate by the Comptroller General.

children.heading: .—Acquisition Programs and Initiatives to Be Considered
children.label: c .—Acquisition Programs and Initiatives to Be Considered

children.text: Selected weapon systems, as determined appropriate by the Comptroller General.
Selected information technology systems and initiatives, including defense business systems, networks, and software-intensive systems, as determined appropriate by the Comptroller General.
Selected prototyping and rapid fielding activities and initiatives, as determined appropriate by the Comptroller General.
